description: Mini scanner rules config. Schema v3 (Apr 25 2026): boost_patterns populated with Tier-A and Tier-B validated winning cohorts from live-data deep-dive. kill_patterns + rules unchanged from v2.

min_score.description: Minimum score to pass. SA = second attempt threshold. DO NOT activate until 30 resolved signals show score correlates with WR.

regime_alignment.description: PERMANENTLY DISABLED — backtest proves Bear regime UP_TRI is highest conviction trade (avg 4.85%). Activating this rule kills the best signals. Never enable without explicit backtest evidence per signal type.

require_volume.description: vol_confirm must be true. Do not activate until Phase 1 shows volume correlates with WR.

grade_gate.description: Only listed grades pass. Phase 2 candidate after Grade A vs B WR comparison.

clean_air.description: Clean air above target required. Phase 2 candidate.

delivery_volume.description: Phase 3 only — delivery_pct filter. Requires NSE Bhavcopy scraping. Do not activate yet.

kill_patterns.reason: 0/11 WR live (Phase B pattern miner). Avg P&L -11.12%, MFE 0% — every trade went against immediately.

boost_patterns.reason: 21/21 WR live. Perfect record. Bear-regime UP_TRI is the strongest validated cohort in the system.
19/19 WR live. Perfect record. Bear-regime defensive rotation into FMCG confirmed.
18/18 WR live. Perfect record. IT rally participation in Bear regime confirmed edge.
15/15 WR live. Perfect record at n=15 floor. Bear-regime Metal breakouts validated.
13/13 WR live. Perfect record but n<15 — below stated Tier A floor. Flagged for upgrade review when n reaches 15+.
~10.5/12 WR live (87.5%). Moderate sample, strong WR — promote to Tier A if n reaches 15+ with WR held.
~14/16 WR live (87.5%) across all sectors in Bear regime. Sector-agnostic cohort — regime is the gate. Drift-check: memory snapshot shows n=17/82%; fix_table canonical.
boost_patterns.notes: sector=null means any sector qualifies; regime=Bear is the filter. Exclude Bank sector if kill_001 widens to BULL_PROXY in future.

notes.rules: Existing 6-rule system from mini_scanner.py DEFAULT_RULES. Each rule has 'active' field. Set to true to activate. Zero Python changes needed. Rules block signals ONLY in active mode — shadow mode lets all pass but logs hits. See each rule's description for phase-based activation guardrails.
notes.kill_patterns: Session 3 (Apr 19 2026). Hard-blocks signals matching signal+sector combo REGARDLESS of shadow_mode. Different from 'rules' above — rules are conditional based on shadow_mode, kill_patterns are absolute. When matched, also triggers contra_tracker.record() to log inverted shadow trade. Each kill_pattern has independent 'active' field for disabling without removing.
notes.warn_patterns: Session 3 placeholder. Signals matching these pass but flagged with caution. Not yet implemented.
notes.boost_patterns: Populated Apr 25 2026. Signals matching these receive conviction tag (TAKE_FULL) when Bridge ships (Wave 2). READ-ONLY FOR NOW — mini_scanner.py does not yet read boost_patterns. Bridge composer will read and elevate matching signals to TAKE_FULL sort bucket. Schema: {id, active, signal, sector (null=any), regime (null=any), tier (A/B), conviction_tag, reason, added_date, source, evidence}. Matching logic (when implemented): signal EQUALS + (sector null OR EQUALS) + (regime null OR EQUALS). If multiple boost_patterns match a signal, highest tier wins. Demotion: if wr drops below 70% in 10-signal rolling window, bump tier from A→B or B→watchlist. Demotion framework is prop_007 / LE-06 (Wave 4).
notes.shadow_mode: When true, rule system lets all signals pass to mini_log. Used during initial data collection. Kill_patterns bypass shadow_mode and block unconditionally. Boost_patterns are not gated by shadow_mode — they are metadata elevation, not filters.
